notes: Public-safe refresh only; private evidence, client names, local paths, and Notion/source trails are excluded.
Final 2026 Word resume is canonical when older site data conflicts with this data.
This data is intended for a content refresh that preserves the site's current layout before any redesign work.

profile.name: Rob Weatherly
profile.title: Azure Infrastructure Architect | Lead Cloud Engineer | Lead Technical Engineering
summary: Infrastructure architect and lead engineer with 25 years in IT and roughly 8 years focused on Azure architecture, implementation, migration, and operations.

Designs and builds Cloud Adoption Framework aligned Azure infrastructure for regulated, complex environments across landing zones, private networking, security governance, hybrid integration, infrastructure as code, and operational handoff.

Known for entering ambiguous or contentious situations where the technical path or client trust has to be reset, challenging weak assumptions, defining the real decisions, and aligning stakeholders around a workable plan.
Uses AI as a force multiplier for design, research validation, documentation, and infrastructure as code while keeping final decisions grounded in tested implementation.

items: VM image build and maintenance processes

experience.title: Senior Consultant and Azure Infrastructure Architect
experience.summary: Azure infrastructure architecture, cloud foundation implementation, regulated platform design, migration and VDI modernization, DevOps/IaC patterns, and client-facing technical leadership.
bullets: Brought in as the architect for ambiguous, unfamiliar, or stalled engagements, turning new platforms and compliance regimes into executable architecture decisions and client-owned runbooks.

Architected and deployed a greenfield CAF-aligned Azure landing zone for a regulated healthcare data platform with private connectivity and HIPAA, NIST 800-53, and CIS policy controls implemented in Bicep.

Advised clients on integrating on-premises Windows, Linux, and SQL Server estates with Azure, designing ExpressRoute and VPN connectivity, hybrid DNS resolution, and Entra ID integration with on-premises AD.

Architected a three-environment Azure data platform for a regulated commercial bank using Synapse Analytics, Data Factory, ADLS Gen2, and Key Vault with private-link networking and Synapse CI/CD promotion.
Owned DevOps and Azure infrastructure for cloud-native web applications using Front Door, App Services, Azure SQL, and Functions, maintaining CI/CD pipelines and delivering updates.
Modernized 200 to 2,000 user VDI estates to Azure Virtual Desktop, migrating off VMware Horizon and Citrix with and without Nerdio and owning host pool, FSLogix, image, and autoscale design.
Reset a contentious healthcare file-share to SharePoint Online migration, building a Power Query model over 800+ inventory exports and 9+ million file records for scope, blockers, and remediation.

Built a VMware-to-Azure migration strategy for 2,000+ workloads with 7R dispositions for 200+ applications, executed a subset with Azure Migrate, and enabled the client cloud team to continue independently.

experience.title: Infrastructure Cloud Architect
experience.summary: Azure infrastructure architecture and cloud solution design for enterprise automotive application teams.
bullets: Designed Azure solutions for application teams across multiple business groups, covering new builds, upgrades, and migrations, and integrated PoC-approved designs with enterprise CI/CD.
Managed on-premises Windows and Linux servers, Active Directory, and SQL Server estates, and integrated them with the enterprise Azure environment.
Standardized the enterprise Azure foundation and delivery practices, defining deployment standards, IaC and CI/CD pipeline patterns, and VM image build and maintenance processes.
Served as lead Azure architect and mentor to multiple junior engineers, raising the team's Azure and DevOps capability.

experience.title: System Architect
experience.summary: Hybrid infrastructure architecture for government healthcare data environments spanning data center, remote locations, and Azure Government.
bullets: Architected hybrid infrastructure for a corporate data warehouse sourced from a primary EMR, spanning the primary data center, remote locations, and Azure Government.
Documented current and future-state architecture and proposed solutions to support growth, improve flexibility, and resolve failure points.
Held Public Trust clearance.

experience.title: Recovery Solutions Architect - Managed Recovery Program
experience.summary: Disaster recovery architecture and managed recovery solution design for enterprise customers.
bullets: Led disaster recovery architecture for managed recovery customers, translating application requirements into recoverable architectures aligned to RTO/RPO and steady-state operating needs.
Served as technical leader and single point of ownership during transition and steady state.
Developed customer-facing architecture and recovery strategy documentation for AWS, SungardAS Cloud, and customized recovery or replication solutions.

experience.title: IT Infrastructure Architect and Technical Lead
experience.summary: Enterprise infrastructure architecture, managed services technical leadership, legacy modernization, migration, and recovery design across global accounts.
bullets: Co-led SAP ECC replatform from AIX/DB2 mainframe to SLES Linux on VMware, including DR design using storage and server replication to support 1-hour RPO and 5-hour RTO targets.

Led enterprise architecture and technical delivery across global managed services teams, including 30+ resources and approximately 250 annual service requests generating about $1.5M per year in additional approved revenue.
Helped turn around troubled delivery environments through issue resolution, maintenance process redesign, patching improvements, security/audit practices, and customer trust rebuilding.

capabilities: ADLS Gen2 with Key Vault CMK

engagementPortfolio.label: Public-Sector Mobile ID Azure Architecture Planning
engagementPortfolio.summary: Architecture advisory for migration of a public-sector mobile identity application from on-premises to Azure.

engagementPortfolio.label: VMware-to-Azure Migration Strategy
engagementPortfolio.summary: Migration strategy for 2,000+ VMware workloads and 200+ application disposition patterns.

engagementPortfolio.summary: AVD modernization across multiple Slalom-era projects with 200 to 2,000 user environments, migrating from VMware Horizon and Citrix with and without Nerdio.

aiPositioning: Uses AI-assisted engineering workflows to accelerate solution research, documentation, IaC drafting, and validation.
Uses AI as a force multiplier, not as a substitute for tested implementation or source-backed decision-making.
Avoid claiming that AI single-handedly reduced project headcount unless a specific public-safe project outcome is confirmed.
